title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Financial Analyst at Shriram Finance Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Shriram Finance Holdings Services in Ghaziabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Shriram Finance Holdings Services:
Shriram Finance Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shriram Finance Holdings Services!
